Customer Support

Book Your One-Way Taxi in 3 Simple Steps

No app download needed. Book online in 30 seconds or call us 24/7.

1

Enter Pickup & Drop

Enter your pickup city, drop city, travel date, and time. Get an instant fare estimate — no signup required.

2

Choose Vehicle & Confirm

Select from our fleet — Hatchback, Sedan, SUV, or Innova Crysta. Confirm your booking in 30 seconds.

3

Travel & Pay

Your verified driver arrives at your doorstep. Travel comfortably and pay via Cash, UPI, or Card at the end.

Why Choose OneWayTaxi.ai?

One Way Fare

Pay only for the distance traveled. No return charges.

Round the clock customer service for your safety.

One Way Taxi — Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about one-way drop taxi services

What is a one-way drop taxi?

A one-way drop taxi is a taxi service where you pay only for the distance from your pickup to your drop location. Unlike traditional round-trip taxis, there are no return charges. This saves you up to 40% on intercity travel. OneWayTaxi.ai is the leading one-way drop taxi provider across South India with 115+ cities covered.

How much does a one-way taxi cost?

One-way taxi fares at OneWayTaxi.ai start from just ₹13/km for a hatchback. Sedan rates start at ₹14/km, SUV at ₹19/km, and Innova Crysta at ₹22/km. All fares include driver bata, toll charges, state permits, and GST — no hidden charges.

Which cities are covered by OneWayTaxi.ai?

OneWayTaxi.ai covers 115+ cities across 5 South Indian states — Tamil Nadu (38 districts), Kerala (14 districts), Andhra Pradesh (26 districts), Telangana (33 districts), and Pondicherry (4 districts). Major cities include Chennai, Bangalore, Coimbatore, Madurai, Hyderabad, Kochi, Tirupati, and more.

Is one-way taxi cheaper than Ola or Uber?

Yes, one-way drop taxis from OneWayTaxi.ai are significantly cheaper than Ola/Uber for outstation travel. Ola and Uber charge return fare (round-trip) for outstation rides, effectively doubling the cost. We charge only for the one-way distance, saving you up to 40%. Plus, our fares are fixed — no surge pricing.

How do I book a one-way taxi online?

Booking a one-way taxi on OneWayTaxi.ai is simple: 1) Enter your pickup city and drop city, 2) Select your travel date and time, 3) Enter your mobile number and submit. You'll get an instant fare estimate and booking confirmation. You can also call us 24/7 at +91 81244 76010.

Are one-way taxi drivers verified and safe?

Absolutely. All OneWayTaxi.ai drivers are background-verified, professionally trained, and carry valid licenses. Every vehicle is GPS-tracked in real-time, regularly serviced, and fully insured. We have maintained a 4.8-star rating from 50,000+ happy customers.
